description: The Socioboard web application needs to be reconfigured for the new 'MarketPulse Hub' infrastructure. Update the configuration file at /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env with the following values, ensuring all other settings remain unchanged: APP_NAME="MarketPulse Hub", MAIL_DRIVER=smtp, MAIL_HOST=smtp.marketpulse.io, MAIL_PORT=587, MAIL_USERNAME=notifications@marketpulse.io, MAIL_PASSWORD=MPulse!Notify2024, MAIL_ENCRYPTION=tls, and SESSION_LIFETIME=480.
